feedback.text: A big problem i see in the current digital age is the destruction of video games. This has been happening for years now and popular video games have been shut down, leaving the buyer without the product they paid for. I think this not very fair to the EU citizens, that a product they paid for can get taken away from them. The popular EU citizens initiative "Stop Killinkg games" has already reached over 1.4 millions signitures. This shows that many people are concerned and want change.
